from typing import TypeAlias

StringList: TypeAlias = list[str]
StringIntMap: TypeAlias = dict[str, int]
Numeric: TypeAlias = str | int
StringSet: TypeAlias = set[str]
IntTuple: TypeAlias = tuple[int, ...]
Number: TypeAlias = int | float
TextOrBytes: TypeAlias = str | bytes
FloatOrInt: TypeAlias = float | int
BoolLike: TypeAlias = bool | int
ByteLike: TypeAlias = bytes | bytearray

def process_items(items: StringList) -> StringIntMap:
    result: StringIntMap = {}
    for item in items:
        result[item] = len(item)
    return result
